features.name: always_comb with variable overwritten by later assignment
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block where a reg variable is assigned a value early in the block, then overwritten with a different value later in the same block, and the variable is used in a separate continuous assignment

features.name: always_comb reading wire fed by assign using same block's variable
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block that reads a wire which is driven by an assign statement that uses a variable also assigned within the same always_comb block

features.name: always_comb multiple assignments same variable different values
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with multiple assignments to the same variable with different literal values, where the variable drives an external wire
